bad_pattern: Using raw MUI Box Container without project-specific PageLayout wrapper
why_bad: Leads to inconsistent padding max-width background across pages every page reinvents the container
fix: Create PageLayout with slots for header content sidebar footer consume theme tokens for spacing background

bad_pattern: Putting a complex multi-section form inside a MUI Dialog
why_bad: Dialogs have limited width and height creates scrollable cramped experience poor mobile UX breaks focus management
fix: Use Drawer for quick create edit use full page for complex forms keep Dialogs for confirmations

bad_pattern: Defining TanStack table columns inline inside page component
why_bad: Not reusable no types hard to test hard to keep consistent leads to drift
fix: Extract typed column configs to shared files or hooks use ColumnType generics

bad_pattern: Using inline sx props or random hex colors in components
why_bad: Breaks theme switching impossible to maintain inconsistent look overrides do not work
fix: Use MUI theme tokens via theme.palette theme.spacing theme.shape map semantic colors success error warning to palette

bad_pattern: Storing server filter sort page state only in local useState
why_bad: Breaks browser back button not shareable via URL resets on refresh
fix: Sync filter sort page with URL query params use controlled TanStack Table with external state

bad_pattern: Creating a separate component for every tiny variation of a MUI Button
why_bad: Component explosion hard to discover inconsistent prop surfaces
fix: Use variant size color props on a single Button wrapper keep abstractions at medium granularity

bad_pattern: Opening a MUI Drawer without clearing its internal form state on close
why_bad: Previous data leaks into next open stale validation errors confusing UX
fix: Reset form via react-hook-form reset in onClose or conditionally unmount open && <DrawerContent />

bad_pattern: Using MUI Dialog without focus management or return focus
why_bad: Keyboard users lose context focus lands at body violates accessibility
fix: Use MUI Dialog which handles focus verify focus returns to trigger after close

bad_pattern: Rendering raw IDs or unformatted dates in table cells
why_bad: Hard to read looks unprofessional inconsistent with rest of app
fix: Use formatters date-fns for dates number formatters status chips for states

bad_pattern: Submitting forms without visual loading state on the submit button
why_bad: Users click multiple times race conditions unclear if action was triggered
fix: Set submitting state from RHF disable submit button or show CircularProgress during async submit

bad_pattern: Hardcoding breadcrumb items per page
why_bad: Drifts from actual routes duplicate data hard to maintain
fix: Derive breadcrumbs from route config use route metadata for titles

bad_pattern: Mixing business logic inside MUI Card presentation components
why_bad: Breaks reusability couples UI to data fetching harder to test
fix: Keep cards presentational fetch data in page container pass data via props

bad_pattern: Hiding critical table columns on mobile without an alternative detail view
why_bad: Users lose access to data on mobile poor UX
fix: Use expandable rows or drawer for mobile detail or horizontal scroll with sticky first column

bad_pattern: Using color alone to indicate status via MUI Chip
why_bad: Colorblind users cannot distinguish states fails WCAG
fix: Add icons or text labels alongside color in StatusChip component

bad_pattern: Using arbitrary font sizes across pages instead of theme typography
why_bad: Breaks visual rhythm inconsistent hierarchy harder to maintain
fix: Use typography scale from MUI theme typography h1 h2 h3 body1 body2 caption

bad_pattern: Using MUI TablePagination for pagination logic instead of TanStack state
why_bad: MUI TablePagination has rigid API does not match enterprise rounded tonal pagination style breaks visual consistency
fix: Build custom Pagination wrapper around MUI Pagination with shape rounded variant tonal connected to TanStack table state

bad_pattern: Using MUI native Table without TanStack react-table
why_bad: No typed columns no sorting no filtering no row selection no faceted filters hard to maintain at scale
fix: Always use TanStack react-table for data logic render with native table or MUI Table components

bad_pattern: Using floating label TextField without shrink true
why_bad: Label overlaps input value breaks enterprise label-above-input pattern looks unprofessional
fix: Use slotProps inputLabel shrink true transform none on MUI TextField or use CustomTextField wrapper

bad_pattern: Missing CardHeader CardContent CardActions structure on cards
why_bad: Card content looks unstructured missing visual hierarchy inconsistent padding
fix: Always use CardHeader for title actions CardContent for body CardActions for buttons with Divider separators

bad_pattern: Using sx prop for business-specific colors instead of theme palette
why_bad: Sx prop overrides are hard to grep and maintain break theme switching
fix: Map business colors to theme palette customColors or use CSS variables from theme

bad_pattern: Using item prop on Grid in MUI v7
why_bad: Item prop was removed in the v7 Grid formerly Grid2. It throws TypeScript errors.
fix: Remove item prop. In MUI v7 all Grid children are items by default.

bad_pattern: Forgetting declare module for variant tonal
why_bad: TypeScript will reject variant tonal on Button Chip Pagination without augmentation.
fix: Add module augmentation for each component that supports custom variants.

bad_pattern: Using MUI v7 without AppRouterCacheProvider
why_bad: Causes CSS injection-order bugs and hydration mismatches in Next.js App Router.
fix: Wrap app in AppRouterCacheProvider from @mui/material-nextjs/v14-appRouter.

bad_pattern: Using rules required true alongside a schema resolver
why_bad: Redundant and can cause conflicting error messages. RHF resolver already handles required checks.
fix: Remove inline rules when using resolver. Trust the schema.

bad_pattern: Hardcoding palette colors instead of using colorSchemes
why_bad: Breaks dark mode and CSS variable switching.
fix: Define palettes inside theme.colorSchemes.light and theme.colorSchemes.dark.

bad_pattern: Forgetting CssBaseline in provider tree
why_bad: Missing baseline resets and CSS variable support.
fix: Render CssBaseline as child of ThemeProvider.

bad_pattern: Forgetting closeAfterTransition false on confirmation dialogs
why_bad: Focus-trap timing bugs especially with stacked sequential dialogs.
fix: Set closeAfterTransition false on Dialog for confirmation dialogs.

bad_pattern: Missing dirty-form confirmation on route leave
why_bad: Users lose work accidentally when navigating away from unsaved forms.
fix: Implement beforeunload event + router guard for dirty forms.

bad_pattern: No React Error Boundaries at page or layout level
why_bad: One crash whitescreens entire app.
fix: Wrap routes in ErrorBoundary with fallback UI retry button error ID.

bad_pattern: Using CircularProgress spinners instead of Skeleton for content loading
why_bad: Layout shift CLS poor perceived performance.
fix: Use MUI Skeleton for known-shape content like cards table rows stat values.

bad_pattern: Missing request cancellation on unmount
why_bad: Race conditions setState after unmount.
fix: Use AbortController or TanStack Query cancellation.

bad_pattern: No optimistic updates for mutations
why_bad: UI feels sluggish users re-submit.
fix: Use TanStack Query optimisticUpdate pattern with rollback on error.

bad_pattern: Icon-only buttons without aria-label
why_bad: Screen readers announce button with no context.
fix: Enforce aria-label or visually hidden text on icon-only buttons.

bad_pattern: Disabling focus outlines globally
why_bad: Violates WCAG 2.4.7 keyboard users lose position.
fix: Use focus-visible with 2px offset ring never outline none globally.

bad_pattern: Missing aria-live on dynamic stat updates
why_bad: Dashboard numbers change silently screen readers miss them.
fix: Wrap StatCard in aria-live polite region.

bad_pattern: Using div with onClick as button
why_bad: Not keyboard-focusable or activatable.
fix: Use MUI ButtonBase or IconButton.

bad_pattern: Missing aria-expanded on custom collapsible panels
why_bad: Screen readers do not know state of expandable content.
fix: Add aria-expanded to Accordion ExpandableRow wrappers.

bad_pattern: Toast notification stacks without role status
why_bad: Screen readers miss async feedback.
fix: Add role status or alert to Snackbar.

bad_pattern: Missing key stability in mapped lists
why_bad: Re-mounts destroy focus and state.
fix: Use stable IDs never array index as key.

bad_pattern: Client-side state mirroring server state
why_bad: Stale data sync bugs.
fix: Use server-state library TanStack Query instead of useState.

bad_pattern: Hardcoding mock data inside chart or table components
why_bad: Breaks when backend is ready impossible to swap to real API creates technical debt
fix: Always use MSW json-server or API layer mock data never inline in components

bad_pattern: Using useEffect fetch without caching or error handling
why_bad: Causes excessive re-renders no loading states no retry poor UX
fix: Use TanStack Query or SWR for all data fetching

bad_pattern: No loading states for API-driven charts or tables
why_bad: Users see blank or broken UI while data loads perceived as bug
fix: Use Skeleton for charts spinners for buttons TanStack Query isLoading

bad_pattern: Missing error handling for backend API failures
why_bad: Users see crashes or infinite loaders with no recovery path
fix: Implement error boundaries retry buttons fallback UI cached data display

bad_pattern: Using setTimeout fake delays instead of MSW or real API
why_bad: Unrealistic performance profile no contract validation no shared spec
fix: Use MSW with realistic network delays or connect to real API

bad_pattern: Keeping json-server or localStorage as production database
why_bad: Data loss no multi-user support no security no scalability
fix: Always plan migration path to real backend json-server is dev-only

bad_pattern: No refetch strategy for real-time dashboard data
why_bad: Shows stale data users miss critical updates dashboards feel dead
fix: Use TanStack Query refetchInterval WebSocket SSE or polling

bad_pattern: Exposing third-party API keys in frontend code
why_bad: Security vulnerability keys can be stolen abuse rate limits
fix: Proxy third-party APIs through backend never expose keys in frontend

bad_pattern: No circuit breaker for unstable backend APIs
why_bad: One failing API cascades to entire UI white screen of death
fix: Implement fallback UI cached data graceful degradation retry with backoff

bad_pattern: Mixing Zustand and TanStack Query without clear separation
why_bad: Confusing data flow duplicate state sync bugs hard to debug
fix: Use TanStack Query for server state Zustand for client state only

bad_pattern: Binding chart directly to raw API response without adapter
why_bad: Tight coupling breaks when API changes chart logic mixed with data fetching
fix: Create chart adapter function map API response to chart data shape

bad_pattern: No empty state for charts with zero data points
why_bad: Empty chart looks broken or crashes chart library
fix: Show empty state illustration or zero baseline when no data

bad_pattern: Using real-time updates without transition animations
why_bad: Jarring jumps in chart data poor perceived performance
fix: Use Recharts animation or smooth transitions for live data updates

bad_pattern: Fetching all chart data on every small filter change
why_bad: Excessive API calls slow performance backend overload
fix: Debounce filter changes use TanStack Query staleTime cache filter state in URL
